V. Test on Insulators (Dry & Wet) Upto 33kV grade 3 Resistance, Dimension & Current capacity of Conductors Upto 33kV grade 4 HV withstand the test of cables Upto 33kV grade 5 Testing on Lamps Lux Level, power rating etc. 6 Transformer oil test Upto 33kV grade Break Down Voltage (BDV) Moisture Tan-Delta Dissolve Gas Analysis (DGA) Inter-facial Test (IFT) 7 Cable Fault location 11/33kV cables 8 Ratio test and Polarization Index Test (PI) for Transformers Upto 33kV grade 9 H V Test, ON/OFF time, Contact resistance Relay and Circuit Breakers (CB) All Relay and Circuit Breakers (CB) u pto 33kV grade 10 Secondary injection test on Transformers Upto 33kV grade 11 KVA rating test on Transformers 1-ϕ and 3- ϕ Transformer 12 Power rating test on Electrical Machines 1-ϕ and 3- ϕ Machines Full List of Beneficiaries KEC International Ltd, Flexituff International, Pith.
